blocks.text: The MICU controls the motor in response to inputs such as wiper switch signals, washer switch signals, and motor auto-stop (AS) signals. In addition to basic operations such as wiper LO/HI, intermittent operation, wiper mist operation, and washer linkage, the MICU performs speed-linked intermittent control and control at startup according to the shift position input, brake switch input, parking brake switch signal, and vehicle speed signal. In addition, some operations can be customized by the customization function.

The MICU controls in response to inputs such as wiper switch signals, backlight signals, washer switch signals, and motor auto-stop (AS) signals. Wiper, intermittent operation, washer linkage, and reverse linkage are set. In addition, some operations can be set to different settings through the customize function.
